title: Emerald Greens — Plotted Township
desc: RERA-aligned plotted development on the Yamuna Expressway growth corridor, minutes from the upcoming Noida International Airport. Title-clear, fully demarcated plots with a built-in land-appreciation thesis.

title: Skyline Residences — Tower A
desc: Tokenised stake in a Grade-A residential tower beside the Noida–Greater Noida metro line. Rental-yield plus capital-appreciation structure with quarterly distribution.

title: Heritage Estate — Gated Villas
desc: Boutique gated villa estate near the airport economic zone. Near fully subscribed — a curated, scarcity-led appreciation play for patient capital.

title: Greenbelt Agri-Land Fund
desc: Aggregated agricultural land bank with managed leasing income. Lower entry, steady-yield instrument for first-time land investors.

title: Marina Waterfront — Phase 1
desc: Marquee mixed-use waterfront development. Institutional-grade asset opened to retail investors in fractional tokens for the first time.

title: Corridor Plotted Dev — Block C
desc: Plotted development along the Eastern Peripheral Expressway logistics corridor. Strong absorption, industrial-led demand tailwind.
